chatbot.welcome: Welcome to Powerton Engineering! How can I help you today?
chatbot.welcomeMessage: Welcome to Powerton Engineering! How can I help you today?

responses.products: We offer a comprehensive range of industrial automation products, electrical components, instrumentation, solar systems, and more. What specific products are you looking for?
responses.services: Our services include installation, maintenance, calibration, technical support, and custom solutions. Which service interests you?
responses.contact: You can reach us at +91-94627-71662 or email us at info@powertonengineering.com. Our headquarters is located in Noida, India, and we serve clients worldwide.
responses.quote: I'd be happy to help you get a quote! Please visit our quote page or provide me with your requirements.
responses.support: Our technical support team is here to help! Please describe your technical question or issue.
responses.productSelection: Great! We have a wide range of industrial products across multiple categories. Which category interests you most?
responses.serviceSelection: We provide comprehensive engineering services to support your projects from start to finish. Which service can we help you with?
responses.troubleshootingMain: I'm here to help you troubleshoot your technical issues. What type of problem are you experiencing?
responses.companyInfo: Powerton Engineering is a leading industrial automation and electrical engineering company with 15+ years of experience. We serve clients worldwide with comprehensive solutions.
responses.sensorsCategory: Our sensor and instrumentation range includes precision measurement devices for industrial applications. What type of sensing do you need?
responses.electricalCategory: We supply comprehensive electrical components for industrial applications including power distribution, control, and protection equipment. What electrical components do you need?
responses.automationCategory: Our automation solutions include PLCs, SCADA, DCS, and HMI systems for complete industrial control. What automation challenge can we solve for you?
responses.solarCategory: We provide complete solar solutions from panels to installation and maintenance. What solar project are you planning?
responses.safetyCategory: Safety is paramount in industrial applications. We offer a full range of protection and safety equipment. What safety equipment do you need?
responses.installationService: Our expert installation teams ensure proper setup and commissioning of your industrial systems. What equipment needs installation?
responses.electricalTroubleshooting: I can help diagnose electrical issues. Common problems include power supply failures, circuit protection trips, and grounding issues. What symptoms are you experiencing?
responses.sensorTroubleshooting: Sensor issues can affect measurement accuracy. Common problems include calibration drift, signal interference, and environmental factors. What sensor problem are you facing?

anand.name: Anand Awasthi
anand.comment: Powerton Engineering made the process of going solar seamless and easy. Their team handled everything from start to finish, and we're thrilled with the results.

sanjay.name: Sanjay Patil
sanjay.comment: I am glad I chose Powerton Engineering for our installation, and I would not hesitate to recommend them to any of my friends.

rhea.name: Rhea Sharma
rhea.comment: Excellent quality products and outstanding customer service. The technical expertise of the team is impressive and highly professional.

priya.name: Priya Mehta
priya.comment: Working with Powerton Engineering was a fantastic experience. Their automation solutions transformed our manufacturing process and improved efficiency by 35%. Highly recommended for industrial automation projects.

kavya.name: Kavya Singh
kavya.comment: Outstanding service and technical support! The team provided exceptional guidance throughout our solar project implementation. Their professional approach and timely delivery exceeded our expectations completely.

rajesh.name: Rajesh Kumar
rajesh.comment: Powerton Engineering delivered exactly what they promised. The instrumentation system they installed has been working flawlessly for over two years. Their after-sales support is remarkable and always responsive.

industrial-automation-demo.title: Demo: Industrial Automation System
industrial-automation-demo.description: Demonstration of complete manufacturing automation capabilities including PLC integration, SCADA systems, and real-time monitoring solutions.

power-distribution-demo.title: Example: Power Distribution Control
power-distribution-demo.description: Example power distribution system showcasing automated load balancing and remote monitoring capabilities for power generation facilities.

thermal-plant.title: Thermal Power Plant Automation
thermal-plant.description: Complete automation solution for 250MW thermal power plant including control panels, SCADA systems, and safety interlocks.

pharma-plant.title: Pharmaceutical Plant Control System
pharma-plant.description: Advanced process control and monitoring system for pharmaceutical manufacturing with FDA compliance and data integrity features.

solar-plant.title: 10MW Solar Power Installation
solar-plant.description: Complete design and installation of grid-connected solar power plant with monitoring systems and grid synchronization equipment.

water-treatment.title: Municipal Water Treatment Automation
water-treatment.description: Automated control system for water treatment plant serving 500,000 residents with real-time monitoring and quality control.
